On Wed, 19 Feb 2025 at 11:40 AM, Tan Jing Ning Jynnice <
jynnice.tanjn@shopee.com> wrote:

Hi Alice

In terms of your concern, maybe we can start a bit lower at $5,200?

   - overall would propose this to still stay close to our matrix as it's
   more scalable, and ensure pay parity among the fresh grad
   - whilst candidates may indicate a lower expected salary, they could
   still be exploring other opportunities. offering competitively helps secure
   these good talents even if they continue to explore other opportunities

Thanks and kind regards,
Anh
